headline: You Might Already Own SpaceX Shares, Without Even Realizing It
summary: SpaceX shares have surged roughly 50% in their first days of trading (although shares are seeing pressure today), and the predictable response from anyone who missed an IPO allocation is the gnawing sense of having missed it. CNBC personal finance correspondent Sharon Epperson used a recent segment to push back on that anxiety with a ... You Might Already Own SpaceX Shares, Without Even Realizing It

headline: Fed rates hold: Stocks and bitcoin drop after Kevin Warsh FOMC debut
summary: Scott Melker discusses Kevin Warsh's debut, CME suing its own regulator, and other big crypto headlines.  "The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

headline: Federated Hermes Touches All-Time High: How to Play the Stock Now?
summary: After reaching an all-time high, can FHI's AUM growth, money market strength and shareholder returns drive further upside? Let us find out.

headline: BlackRock® Canada Announces June Cash Distributions for the iShares® ETFs
summary: TORONTO, June 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BlackRock Asset Management Canada Limited (“BlackRock Canada”), an indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary of BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK), today announced the June 2026 cash distributions for the iShares ETFs listed on the TSX or Cboe Canada which pay on a monthly, quarterly, or semi-annual basis. Unitholders of record of the applicable iShares ETF on June 25, 2026 will receive cash distributions payable in respect of that iShares ETF on June 30, 2026. Detail
